query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `opportunities` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `title` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `description` text,
  `organizer` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `deadline` timestamp NOT NULL,
  `opportunityType` enum('Scholarship','Fellowship','Accelerator','Incubator','Competition','Internship','Grant','Conference','Exchange Program') NOT NULL,
  `stage` enum('High school','Undergraduate','Graduate','Startup idea','MVP','Revenue','Scale') NOT NULL,
  `regions` json NOT NULL,
  `mode` enum('Online','In-person','Hybrid') NOT NULL,
  `fields` json NOT NULL,
  `funding` enum('Fully funded','Partial','Stipend','Equity-based','Paid') NOT NULL,
  `requirements` text,
  `benefits` text,
  `programStartDate` timestamp NULL,
  `programEndDate` timestamp NULL,
  `fundingAmount` varchar(100),
  `applicationLink` varchar(500),
  `isFeatured` boolean DEFAULT false,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `applications` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `userId` int NOT NULL,
  `opportunityId` int NOT NULL,
  `status` enum('Applied','In Progress','Accepted','Rejected') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'Applied',
  `appliedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `notes` text,
  `requiredDocs` json,
  `interviewDate` timestamp NULL,
  `programStartDate` timestamp NULL,
  `programEndDate` timestamp NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `savedOpportunities` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `userId` int NOT NULL,
  `opportunityId` int NOT NULL,
  `savedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
